prestazioni: Engine swap to Mazda's 2.5L turbocharged Skyactiv-G PY-VPTS (from the Mazda3 Turbo/CX-30 Turbo) with forged internals (Manley connecting rods, JE pistons) and a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger, paired with a custom 3.5-inch turbo-back exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power Spec-L with titanium tips and a front-mounted intercooler upgrade from GReddy Type-RS.

Full bolt-on reinforcement for the SKYACTIV-D 2.2L diesel (SH-VPTS) variant, including a BorgWarner EFR 7670 turbo upgrade, custom fuel system with Denso 2200cc injectors, and a standalone ECU tune by Haltech Elite 2500 with flex-fuel capability, supporting E85 blends for increased power output (target: 280hp/550Nm).

Chassis-specific suspension overhaul with Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (CX-8-specific valving), Cusco 22mm front sway bar, and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF1048K) for the rear subframe, paired with Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers (355mm rotors) and 4-piston rear calipers (330mm rotors) for improved braking performance.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Pandem widebody kit (CX-8-specific, part #RB-CX8-01) with carbon fiber overfenders, custom front splitter, and rear diffuser, paired with a custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and blacked-out Mazda badges.

OEM+ interior upgrade with Recaro Sportster CS seats (CX-8-compatible mounts), Nardi 380mm steering wheel with Alcantara trim, and a custom gauge cluster overlay by Defi Advance BF (boost, oil temp, and wideband AFR monitoring).

Exterior lighting overhaul with LUX H8 V4 LED headlight bulbs, custom sequential LED taillights by VLEDS (CX-8-specific housing), and a carbon fiber hood with functional heat extractor vents (replica of the Mazda RX-Vision concept design).
